allow: PowerShell(.\\pipeline.exe --version; Write-Host "---"; \(Get-Item .\\pipeline.exe\).VersionInfo | Format-List FileVersion, ProductVersion, CompanyName, FileDescription, ProductName, LegalCopyright)
PowerShell(.\\tlog-gen.exe --version; Write-Host "---"; \(Get-Item .\\tlog-gen.exe\).VersionInfo | Format-List FileVersion, ProductVersion, CompanyName, FileDescription, ProductName, LegalCopyright)
